message:
refactor(pages): unify site directory resolution across all pages subsystems with shared resolve_site_dir()

All encryption/decryption/key-management/verify/preview operations now accept
either a "bundle root" directory (containing a site/ subdirectory) or the site/
directory itself. Previously callers had to pass the exact site/ path, creating
a usability papercut and inconsistency across the pages subsystem.

Core change (mod.rs):
- New shared resolve_site_dir(path) utility: if path's filename is "site",
  returns as-is; if path contains a site/ subdirectory, returns that; otherwise
  returns the path unchanged

Consumers updated:
- verify.rs: local resolve_site_dir() replaced by delegation to shared function,
  removing ~16 lines of duplicate logic
- preview.rs: start_preview_server() now resolves via shared function instead of
  bare existence check
- encrypt.rs: decrypt_to_file() and load_config() now call resolve_site_dir()
  so decryption works when given a bundle root
- key_management.rs: all 5 public key functions (key_list, key_add_password,
  key_add_recovery, key_revoke, key_rotate) call resolve_site_dir() at entry
- bundle.rs: generate_integrity_manifest() visibility changed to pub(crate) so
  key_management can call it directly

Integrity manifest consistency fix (key_management.rs):
- Deleted update_integrity_hash() (which only patched a single entry, risking
  manifest drift after key mutations) and replaced all call sites with
  regenerate_integrity_manifest() delegating to the canonical
  generate_integrity_manifest() from bundle.rs
- Removed now-unnecessary sha256_hex() helper and unused BufReader import
- setup_test_archive() now creates a proper bundle via BundleBuilder

Tests:
- E2E tests updated to pass bundle_root (parent of site/) to all functions
- New test_resolve_site_dir_accepts_bundle_root (preview.rs)
- New test_load_config_and_decrypt_accept_bundle_root (encrypt.rs)
- New test_key_add_password_preserves_valid_integrity_manifest (key_management.rs)
- New test_key_rotate_preserves_valid_integrity_manifest (key_management.rs)
- New integration_preview_accepts_bundle_root (pages_preview_integration.rs):
  builds encrypted bundle, starts preview at bundle root, verifies index.html served

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
